name: clean knee MRI — right knee, intact menisci and ligaments

report.indication: Right knee pain after twisting injury.
report.technique: Right knee MRI without contrast at 3T including PD, T2 fat-saturated, and T1 sequences.
report.findings: Menisci: intact medial and lateral menisci, no tear. Ligaments: ACL, PCL, MCL, LCL intact. Articular cartilage: intact. Bones: no marrow oedema or fracture. Soft tissues: small joint effusion.
report.impression:
1. No internal derangement of the right knee.
2. Small right knee joint effusion.
